caption: The video captures a scene from a public event or meeting, likely held in a community hall or similar venue. A man is seated at a piano on the right side of the stage, while an older woman stands at a podium on the left, addressing the audience. The audience consists of various individuals, some of whom are attentively listening to the speaker. The man at the piano appears to be preparing to play or has just finished playing, as he leans forward towards the instrument. The setting includes wooden blinds covering the windows behind the stage, and the atmosphere suggests a formal yet intimate gathering, possibly involving music and speech. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or event name.
